arts.ttl: Paul Pogba's next club: Man Utd three-peat, MLS link-up with Lionel Messi or Olivier Giroud & the eight free transfer options for France World Cup winner after doping ban ends - ranked
arts.sum: The former Manchester United and Juventus star's 18-month doping suspension ends in March, at which point he will be able to sign for a new club as a free agent. A club that plays in the Champions League?

arts.ttl: Premier League title race: Can Liverpool hold off Arsenal after Arne Slot's team drew against Aston Villa, Everton?
arts.sum: Liverpool's two draws in their last three Premier League games has led to some concern that they could lose out on the title to rivals Arsenal.
